subcodes.first_line: O ye spiritual youths! Many a youth inhabiting this mound of earth is only thinking of this material plane
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جوانان روحانی هر جوانی از اهل این خاکدان در فکر این جهان و منهمک در شهوات
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @high station of the true believer, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
